'''kongawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:okkerd|okkerd]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okkerd|okkerd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kongawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongawithi|kongawithi]] || [[word:kongawiji|kongawiji]] || [[word:kongawishi|kongawishi]] || [[word:kongawiki|kongawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongawuthuthu|kongawuthuthu]] || [[word:kongawujuju|kongawujuju]] || [[word:kongawushushu|kongawushushu]] || [[word:kongawukuku|kongawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongawuthu|kongawuthu]] || [[word:kongawuju|kongawuju]] || [[word:kongawushu|kongawushu]] || [[word:kongawuku|kongawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongawufthuf|kongawufthuf]] || [[word:kongawufjuf|kongawufjuf]] || [[word:kongawufshuf|kongawufshuf]] || [[word:kongawufkuf|kongawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongawethe|kongawethe]] || [[word:kongaweje|kongaweje]] || [[word:kongaweshe|kongaweshe]] || [[word:kongaweke|kongaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongawothotho|kongawothotho]] || [[word:kongawojojo|kongawojojo]] || [[word:kongawoshosho|kongawoshosho]] || [[word:kongawokoko|kongawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongawotho|kongawotho]] || [[word:kongawojo|kongawojo]] || [[word:kongawosho|kongawosho]] || [[word:kongawoko|kongawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongawofthof|kongawofthof]] || [[word:kongawofjof|kongawofjof]] || [[word:kongawofshof|kongawofshof]] || [[word:kongawofkof|kongawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongawïfthïf|kongawïfthïf]] || [[word:kongawïfjïf|kongawïfjïf]] || [[word:kongawïfshïf|kongawïfshïf]] || [[word:kongawïfkïf|kongawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongawïfthïfthïf|kongawïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kongawïfjïfjïf|kongawïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kongawïfshïfshïf|kongawïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kongawïfkïfkïf|kongawïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongawïfthïf|kongawïfthïf]] || [[word:kongawïfjïf|kongawïfjïf]] || [[word:kongawïfshïf|kongawïfshïf]] || [[word:kongawïfkïf|kongawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongawïfthïf|kongawïfthïf]] || [[word:kongawïfjïf|kongawïfjïf]] || [[word:kongawïfshïf|kongawïfshïf]] || [[word:kongawïfkïf|kongawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongawæthæ|kongawæthæ]] || [[word:kongawæjæ|kongawæjæ]] || [[word:kongawæshæ|kongawæshæ]] || [[word:kongawækæ|kongawækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongawathatha|kongawathatha]] || [[word:kongawajaja|kongawajaja]] || [[word:kongawashasha|kongawashasha]] || [[word:kongawakaka|kongawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongawatha|kongawatha]] || [[word:kongawaja|kongawaja]] || [[word:kongawasha|kongawasha]] || [[word:kongawaka|kongawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongawafthaf|kongawafthaf]] || [[word:kongawafjaf|kongawafjaf]] || [[word:kongawafshaf|kongawafshaf]] || [[word:kongawafkaf|kongawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kongawasha|kongawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kongawshësha|kongawshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kongawrosha|kongawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kongawmusha|kongawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kongawyasha|kongawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokongawnkshësha|gokongawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokongawnkrosha|gokongawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokongawnkmusha|gokongawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokongawnkyasha|gokongawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kongangawasha|kongangawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kongangawshësha|kongangawshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kongangawrosha|kongangawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kongangawmusha|kongangawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kongangawyasha|kongangawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokongangawnkshësha|gokongangawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokongangawnkrosha|gokongangawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokongangawnkmusha|gokongangawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokongangawnkyasha|gokongangawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kengæwasha|kengæwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kengæwshësha|kengæwshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kengæwrosha|kengæwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kengæwmusha|kengæwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kengæwyasha|kengæwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokengæwnkshësha|gokengæwnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokengæwnkrosha|gokengæwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokengæwnkmusha|gokengæwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokengæwnkyasha|gokengæwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kongfawasha|kongfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kongfawshësha|kongfawshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kongfawrosha|kongfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kongfawmusha|kongfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kongfawyasha|kongfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokongfawnkshësha|gokongfawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokongfawnkrosha|gokongfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokongfawnkmusha|gokongfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokongfawnkyasha|gokongfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
